standard_rows: All non-jump actions use the same 185/198 matched scale as gugugaga-exact. Every jump frame is fixed at 185px high with a 0/11/18/11/0 vertical arc, so the click transition changes position without changing size.
directions: The labeled 16-direction loop follows the intended axes and quadrants monotonically. All four cardinal hard gates pass blind review.
warnings: The waving row now uses the user-approved flat 2D source instead of the previous 3D render. Waiting, running, and review reuse one approved generated thinking-pose family in different frame orders because additional exact-character edits were repeatedly moderation-blocked. The 112.5 and 247.5 vertical components are subtle in isolated blind pairs.
repair: No blocking repair remains. Residual differences are documented in SOURCE.md and the row provenance files.

motionRepairs.jumping: gugugaga-exact matched-all-actions fixed-height jump: 185px, offsets 0/11/18/11/0, click size difference 0
